name: constants
invariants: Object.values(output.result.constants).every(function(c){ return Number.isFinite(c.value) && typeof c.units === 'string' && typeof c.name === 'string'; })
_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler (dispatch key 'physics.constants'; 3-arg). Deterministic static catalog of 15 CODATA physical constants, each { value, units, name }. Drives PhysicsActionPanel.actConst + PhysicsWorkbench.ConstantsTab; component renders constants[sym].value.toExponential(...) + .units + .name. Ignores input entirely (degrade-graceful). Not assassin-driven (LENS_ACTIONS); authored spec pinned by server/tests/physics-lens-macros.test.js.
